title: functions returning void not supported
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Synthesize e.g.:

```
    function void read_next_instr([31:0] _next_pc);
    endfunction
```

## Expected behavior

Will synthesize ok. e.g. verilator and iverilog simulators both support this syntax. And e.g. https://www.quora.com/What-is-the-use-of-void-function-in-system-Verilog

## Actual behavior

Doesn't synthesize. Error, like e.g.:

```
src/proc.sv:52: ERROR: syntax error, unexpected TOK_ID, expecting '(' or ';'
```
code_blocks: src/proc.sv:52: ERROR: syntax error, unexpected TOK_ID, expecting '(' or ';'
